hero.subtitle: Join thousands of learners worldwide and level up your English with expert-led courses, interactive lessons, and a personalized learning path.

bullets.personalizedPath: Personalized learning path for your level

features.title: Why
features.subtitle: We provide everything you need to master English and reach your learning goals

expert.title: Expert-led courses
expert.description: Learn from native instructors with years of teaching experience

flexible.title: Flexible schedule
flexible.description: Learn at your own pace with 24/7 access to course materials

interactive.title: Interactive learning
interactive.description: Engage with classmates and instructors via live sessions and forums

global.title: Global community
global.description: Connect with learners around the world and practice together

certified.title: Certified program
certified.description: Earn a recognized certificate upon completing the course

proven.title: Proven results
proven.description: 98% of our learners report measurable progress

services.title: Every tool you need to
services.subtitle: From AI-graded Speaking & Writing to a personalized path, gamified practice and live classes. One place for the entire journey.

aiGrading.title: AI Speaking & Writing grading
aiGrading.description: Record or write, and get an instant band score with detailed feedback on every criterion, just like a real examiner.

placement.title: Adaptive placement test
placement.description: Pinpoint your exact level in minutes with a smart test that adapts to every answer.

learningPath.title: Personalized learning path
learningPath.description: Get a step-by-step roadmap tailored to your goals, level, and schedule.

skillTree.title: Gamified skill tree
skillTree.description: Unlock skills node by node and turn steady progress into a game you want to keep playing.

flashcards.title: Smart flashcards (SRS)
flashcards.description: Lock in vocabulary for good with spaced-repetition decks that resurface words right before you forget.

dictation.title: Dictation practice
dictation.description: Sharpen listening and spelling with bite-sized dictation drills and instant correction.

mockExams.title: Mock IELTS & TOEIC exams
mockExams.description: Sit full, timed practice tests that mirror the real thing, then review every answer.

live.title: Live classes & AI avatar
live.description: Join interactive live rooms or practice anytime with a lifelike AI conversation tutor.

analytics.title: Progress analytics
analytics.description: Track scores, streaks, and strengths over time with a dashboard that shows what to study next.

howItWorks.title: Your journey in four steps
howItWorks.subtitle: From your first test to a certificate, with a clear path the whole way.

assess.title: Take the placement test
assess.description: A quick adaptive test finds your true starting level across every skill.

plan.title: Get your AI learning path
plan.description: Receive a personalized roadmap built around your goals and weak spots.

practice.title: Practice with AI feedback
practice.description: Learn through courses, flashcards, dictation and AI-graded Speaking & Writing.

achieve.title: Track progress & achieve
achieve.description: Watch your scores climb and earn a recognized completion certificate.

pricing.title: Pick the plan that fits your
pricing.subtitle: Unlock AI Speaking & Writing grading, a personal learning path, and many more advanced features.
pricing.footnote: Cancel anytime · Prorated refunds · Secure payment via Alicia wallet

confirm.title: Confirm {{plan}} subscription
confirm.description: Payment will be deducted directly from your Alicia wallet.
confirm.insufficient: Insufficient balance. Please top up your wallet.

story.title: Born from a simple
story.p1: Founded in 2020, Alicia was born from a simple yet powerful vision: deliver high-quality English education to anyone, regardless of location or circumstance.
story.p2: Starting from a small, passionate team, we have grown into a global platform serving thousands of learners across more than 50 countries.
story.p3: Today, we continue to innovate and refine our courses to ensure every learner gets the best possible learning experience.

values.title: Core values
values.subtitle: The principles guiding everything we do

mission.title: Our mission
mission.description: Deliver quality English education to everyone, everywhere, and empower learners to reach their goals.

team.title: Expert instructors
team.description: Our instructors are certified experts who are experienced and passionate about teaching.

quality.title: Quality first
quality.description: We hold the highest standards in course content, delivery, and learner support.

success.title: Learner success
success.description: Your success is our priority. We walk alongside you throughout your learning journey.

catalog.title: Discover courses
catalog.subtitle: Browse the catalog, filter by level, and find content that fits you.

cta.title: Join our growing community
cta.subtitle: Start your journey to mastering English alongside our experts.
